prompt: Any advice on easing into a high-volume hypertrophy-focused mesocycle after a powerlifting meet without losing my strength gains?
assertions: Recommends keeping competition lifts in moderate strength-relevant rep ranges (not shifting entirely to high reps)
Suggests mostly working in approximately the 5-10 rep range
Recommends periodic heavier exposure (e.g., triples or heavy singles) to maintain top-end strength
Mentions an over-warm or heavy single around RPE 8 before volume work as a practical strategy
